task_completion.description: Select Dive #3 (December 4, 2010 at Sund Rock) from the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive list shows Dive #3 highlighted or selected, with the date 'Dec 4, 2010' and location 'Sund Rock' visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the equipment or cylinder configuration tab for the selected dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Equipment' or 'Cylinders' tab is active in the dive details panel, displaying the list of cylinders for Dive #3.

task_completion.description: Add a new cylinder or edit an existing one to have a size of 12.0 liters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cylinder entry in the equipment list shows '12.0' in the size/volume column or input field.

task_completion.description: Set the cylinder's working pressure to 200 bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same cylinder entry shows '200' in the working pressure column or input field.

task_completion.description: Set the cylinder's gas mix to 32% O2 (EAN32).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cylinder entry shows '32' or '32%' in the O2/Gas mix column or input field.

task_completion.description: Save the changes made to the dive log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save' button, or the UI shows the dive changes are finalized (e.g., no unsaved changes indicator, and the new cylinder is visible in the dive summary).

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to make changes, not a terminal or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Subsurface application interface being interacted with, rather than terminal commands executing scripts to modify the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing the underlying XML/SSRF file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) are visible showing the raw XML data of the dive log.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard Subsurface UI, not a web browser search or a mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Dive: Dive #3, dated 2010-12-04 (second dive of the day at Sund Rock). Expected Cylinder Size: 12.0 liters. Expected Working Pressure: 200 bar. Expected Gas Mix (O2): 32%.
